languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

languages.text: "Я могу лишь поощрить подобное стремление к познания! Спрашивайте".
"I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."
languages.original_text: "Я могу лишь поощрить подобное стремление к познания! Спрашивайте".

traits.locale_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."
"I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."
"I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

languages.text: «¡Debo apoyar toda sed de conocimiento! Pregunte sin miedo».
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

traits.locale_text: «¡Debo apoyar toda sed de conocimiento! Pregunte sin miedo».

languages.text: “我非常鼓励这样的求知欲！尽管问吧。”
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

traits.locale_text: “我非常鼓励这样的求知欲！尽管问吧。”

languages.text: « Une soif de savoir que je ne peux qu'encourager ! Posez vos questions. »
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

traits.locale_text: « Une soif de savoir que je ne peux qu'encourager ! Posez vos questions. »

languages.text: "Ich kann einen solchen Wissensdurst nur unterstützen! Fragt."
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann einen solchen Wissensdurst nur unterstützen! Fragt."

languages.text: "私はそのような知識欲を煽ることしかできない！どんどん聞いてください"
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

languages.text: "İrfana olan açlığınızı yalnızca teşvik edebilirim! Sorun."
languages.original_text: "I can only encourage such a thirst for knowledge! Ask away."

traits.locale_text: "İrfana olan açlığınızı yalnızca teşvik edebilirim! Sorun."
